name: First contact | Argemia
description:
You were sat at your workstation late at night, calibrating your equipment until you heard something from upstairs. Something *or someone* is ransacking your fridge again.

*uh.. so yeah, Voices of the Void. This is unapologetically niche, hyper specific and unconventional. Yes she has 6 tits, cry about it. She's also fairly tall.*

*Also, you guys REALLY LOVED the Axolotl girl, so maybe I'll give you guys some more really soon. Thanks for the 10K+ chats.* 

*(For a bit of context, at this point she had been observing you but you had never seen her in person, only having encountered their shelter and ships)*
creator: Brummhk
